meta._authoring_note: Draft. Pre-flight: (1) Replace the Slack webhook URL in 'POST Slack incoming webhook' with the value from your Slack admin. (2) After import, wire this workflow in Settings → Error Workflow so the four other flows route their throws here. Without this wiring, validation throws in the MarketBeat / news / county flows will die silently in n8n's execution log. (3) Optional alternative: swap the HTTP node for n8n's native Slack node if you have a Slack credential set up there.
